name: into-thin-air-a-personal-account-of-the-mt-everest-disaster
description: Jon Krakauer's 'Into Thin Air: A Personal Account of the Mt. Everest Disaster' — the definitive account of the 1996 Everest disaster. Eight climbers died in a single storm. Commercialism, ambition, and the death zone. Krakauer's survival and guilt. A searing exploration of the human costs of extreme adventure.
